risks.title: Security module modified without verification
risks.evidence: Security.tsx changed 4 times within 17 seconds (19:02:22-19:02:39), with 50% duplicate events. Security-sensitive files require immediate validation.
risks.recommendedAction: Review Security.tsx diff, verify changes align with security policy, and run security tests before merge

opportunities.title: Reduce event duplication in code-observer
opportunities.evidence: 50% of events are duplicates (same file, timestamps within 1ms). Events 1a8ac5bf/feeb32e1 are noise.
opportunities.suggestedAction: Implement event deduplication by (file, timestamp window) to improve signal-to-noise ratio

taskCandidates.title: Review Security.tsx changes
taskCandidates.description: Analyze the recent modifications to /home/riad/github/kairos/src/screens/Security.tsx and verify they meet security standards
taskCandidates.rationale: Security-sensitive files warrant immediate review before integration

taskCandidates.title: Fix code-observer event deduplication
taskCandidates.description: Add deduplication logic to filter events generated within rapid succession on identical files (e.g., <2s window, same path)
taskCandidates.rationale: Duplicate events create false urgency and reduce team trust in monitoring system

recommendations.title: Immediate security review required
recommendations.rationale: Security.tsx is a sensitive file; recent changes must be validated before proceeding
recommendations.action: Run `git diff HEAD~1 src/screens/Security.tsx` and security linter, then review in PR with @security-team

recommendations.title: Deduplicate event stream
recommendations.rationale: 50% event noise reduces ability to detect real issues and creates alert fatigue
recommendations.action: Implement temporal deduplication in code-observer: if same file modified within 2s window, merge into single event with highest relevance

pendingApprovals.reason: Sensitive proactive task requires approval: Review Security.tsx changes
